success_surface: Multi-condition column-based data filtering and conditional updates
effective_behaviors: Applied compound conditions across multiple columns before executing updates
Validated numeric type properties (whole number vs decimal) as part of filter logic
Performed string matching on target column with exact text comparison
Logged verification output confirming affected rows and their original values
Resolved initial syntax errors before producing executable code
evidence: Solution confirmed rows met dual criteria: specific text in first column AND whole number value in second column
Output explicitly listed which rows were updated (10 and 13) with their original values
Evaluation result passed both soft (1.0) and hard (1) restrictions indicating correct cell modifications
Initial syntax error was corrected and final solution executed without further issues

memory_items.title: Compound Column Filtering
memory_items.lesson: When updating cells based on conditions, evaluate all required columns simultaneously before applying changes.
memory_items.generalization: For tasks requiring conditional edits, construct combined boolean masks across relevant columns rather than sequential filters that may lose alignment.

memory_items.title: Numeric Property Validation
memory_items.lesson: Distinguish between numeric types by checking decimal presence when whole-number conditions are specified.
memory_items.generalization: Use modulo operations or integer casting to verify if numeric values meet whole-number criteria before triggering actions.

memory_items.title: Update Verification Logging
memory_items.lesson: Document which rows matched criteria and received updates to enable post-execution validation.
memory_items.generalization: Store row indices and original values during iteration to produce audit trail output confirming correct modifications occurred.

memory_items.title: Syntax Debugging Protocol
memory_items.lesson: Resolve syntax errors immediately when they occur rather than proceeding with broken code.
memory_items.generalization: Always validate code execution readiness by catching and correcting syntax errors before attempting actual data operations.

edits.content:
## Success Patterns from Trajectory Analysis

### Compound Condition Evaluation
- When modifications depend on multiple column criteria, evaluate all conditions together before iterating to maintain row integrity.
- Create unified boolean filters rather than sequential row-by-row checks that may cause misalignment.

### Numeric Value Type Checking
- Implement explicit checks for whole-number status using modulo or integer conversion when "no decimal" conditions are specified.
- Handle negative numbers correctly when checking for whole-number values.

### Conditional Update Safety
- Only apply transformations to rows meeting ALL specified conditions simultaneously.
- Log affected row indices and their original values before modification for verification purposes.

### Error Resolution Priority
- Fix syntax or runtime errors immediately upon detection; do not proceed with partial implementations.
- Ensure code block formatting is valid Python before execution attempts.
